results.title: Jennifer Siebel Newsom encourages sports for CA body, mind at Sacramento event
results.description: First Partner Jennifer Siebel Newsom speaks during an event celebrating the Move Your Body, Calm Your Mind campaign at Street Soccer USA in Sacramento on Friday, May 29, 2026. The initiative encourages Californians of all ages to increase their physical activity and improve their mental well-being.
